title: Failure Classification and Retry Budgets · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a typed Go failure and retry policy with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a typed Go failure and retry policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify wrapped Go failures with errors.Is and errors.As, then combine typed cause evidence with bounded attempt, age, delay, cancellation, and terminal disposition.
Bound attempts, total age, delay, processing deadline, queue residence, and operator escalation as one retry budget; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Apply exponential backoff and jitter without blocking consumer slots or requeueing hot loops and preserve intended availability time; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Transient Permanent Ambiguous
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 5233 during consumer shutdown drill with one blocked handler goroutine. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify failures and enforce attempt, age, delay, and terminal retry budgets; keep message identity out of metric labels while preserving causal traces; then reuse a message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify wrapped Go failures with errors.Is and errors.As, then combine typed cause evidence with bounded attempt, age, delay, cancellation, and terminal disposition.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Retry Observability Ownership, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Retry Observability Ownership precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Retry Observability Ownership, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug Go messaging team handles case 5424 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify failures and enforce attempt, age, delay, and terminal retry budgets; name the owner and stop path for every goroutine and notification channel; then introduce a keyed sequence gap during single-active failover. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Record original identity, attempt, reason, first and next time, owner, budget, terminal disposition, and causal metrics without high-cardinality leaks; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Retry Observability Ownership, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Queue depth alone explains whether retries are healthy. In Go, wrapping every failure as retryable improves resilience.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Retry Observability Ownership
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Retry Observability Ownership: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go messaging team handles case 1281 during bounded worker pool during a dependency slowdown. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify failures and enforce attempt, age, delay, and terminal retry budgets; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Record original identity, attempt, reason, first and next time, owner, budget, terminal disposition, and causal metrics without high-cardinality leaks; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Retry Observability Ownership.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Retry Observability Ownership, keep Retry Observability Ownership connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record original identity, attempt, reason, first and next time, owner, budget, terminal disposition, and causal metrics without high-cardinality leaks; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
